name: Grupo International Inc.
summary: Grupo International Inc., through its subsidiaries, engages in the mining, retail stores, and technology businesses. The company involved in the construction of mines and exploitation of stone materials; operation of a chain of hardware stores under RIMART and MECA brands; provision of the integrated emergency management system, a solution for command and control centers; operation of boutique and beer stores; and provision of Web hosting soluitons. The company was formerly known as Hiv-Vac Inc. and changed its name to Grupo International Inc. in September 2010. Grupo International Inc. was founded in 1997 and is based in Tijuana, Mexico. As of November 28, 2017, Grupo International Inc. operates as a subsidiary of Full Alliance Group, Inc.
